Hi.
Hi.
Hi.

Hello.
Hi.
How's it going?
Good.
Hey.
All right.
Sharing my screen.
Did you guys who attended the Udemy kickoff yesterday?

maybe I weren't there?
and Marcel were there, and Kyle was running that account, so they recorded it with the media recorder in the boardroom.
Okay.
All right, clerk.
So we have, do we have a product that I've set up for them, like, this week?
I know we have something with Ambient.
Let's see.
Yeah, so, oh, no.
we're waiting to schedule.
He sent some materials for us to, like, read it over, and he said if we still need more info, that we can go ahead and schedule, but he sent us a link to the docs and a bunch of stuff on his website.
Yeah, yeah, okay, that's fine.
Did we schedule a weekly sync with them?
Let me check my calendar.
that's all third.
Okay, that's fine.
All right, I think I can update the artifacts, and we can share those with them today ahead of the weekly sync this week.
Okay.
Ambient.
Simran, she's working on the artifacts today.
So, we have a product deep dive scheduled tomorrow.
All right.
Is Simran on this call?
All right.
I want to make sure she joins going forward.
Tavern.
So they haven't responded yet, but I'm going ahead and doing some initial keyword research for them just to fill out the content OS.
We have a meeting with them tomorrow, so I can show that in addition to the strategy.
Okay.
Is that something that Matt can do, just given everything else you're working on?
I mean, I started on it already, Matt's catching up with outreach and stuff, but when we move on with, like, the wholesale keyword research, he can take care of that.
Sounds good.
Aida, just so know, for that account, Tavern, their founder's young, super busy, so they've kind of always been like that, like, a little scattered, not that easy to talk to.
And, I mean, I've asked them a few times after, like, they haven't responded, like, what's the best way to communicate Slack?
Yeah.
true.

email, like, what works best, and they keep saying Slack, so it's normal, I guess, maybe on the call, try to figure, like, another way to get information over to them, because it's pretty much a week in between them responding, so.
Yeah.
Okay.
So for outreach, I sent them the three outlines for the blogs that we need to do this week.
Um, they're going to review them today, and then as soon as we get the green light, I'm going to send them to Matt to just generate the drafts.
Um, and then, uh, Matt, I don't know if you got the notification in Notion, but I tagged you, um, in Joe's, uh, vacation coverage talk, so there are a couple of, um, action items in there.
Pressure recorded a loom, so it should be pretty clear what we need to do, but basically it.
Involves going through, like, I think there's an audit tab in their Airtable and just tagging the content that's already on their website and that we might want to refresh.
So if you could do that, like, today, tomorrow, or Thursday, that'd be great as we're, like, also generating the content.
Cool.
Sentinel One.
Sydney is wrapping up three blogs for Sentinel One.
We have a meeting with them tomorrow, so I'm going to share that.
And we need to really figure out a way, like, who is the best person to do the reviews and approve the content.
I'm going to push for Ankit, because he is sort of the SEO lead, and he is probably the one with the most time on his hands.
yeah.
Mahadi is very, very busy, so, you know, I think if we wait on her to do a review, we're not going to publish for a very long time.
Okay, so switch out the approver, essentially.
Yeah, yeah.
So, on this one, I'm halfway through the audit, and I found some actually, some pretty good stuff here.
Like, all the resource pages are canonical to a different domain, which could be intentional or not intentional, but that's a huge mess on their end if they want that stuff indexed.
So, Aida, I'll put all this into a spreadsheet and send it your way, and I'm done.
Aida, you guys meet with them on Thursday morning, is that right?
Or Wednesday?
Wednesday.
Okay, so Dave, can you get that?
Ready for their meeting tomorrow?
sounds like a good action item.
Yeah, I'll be done by tomorrow.
Okay.
So their meeting is this time tomorrow, so probably end of day today, so Aida can review it in the morning.
Do we want to talk about Okta?
Yeah, we can talk about Okta quick.
I'm going do some more work on that today.
But it's in a good spot.
Basically, same thing.
STR enablement workflows, boiling down all the niche artifacts we've made to, you know, an STR call prep brief and an account brief.
It'll automatically be created whenever the seller gets a target prospect and then, like, a website that the company works at.
And then we have two more deep dives today with, or not today, this week.
With SDRs, actual SDRs on their team, today has just been leaders on the sales team, product team, and in the retail division.
So that'll round out all of the even more niche areas on the briefs, like the objections, what they're actually hearing from customers, all that.
So, yeah, business as usual.

So, George, I wonder if it might be useful to have Stevie join one or two of those, like, deep dive calls, especially since we're going to use this workflow to improve our own, our, like, internal context generator, so she can kind of see, like, end-to-end how we...
Yeah, I'm already meeting with Stevie and EPD to help me make this workflow.
Okay, yeah, I was just thinking, like, it might be nice for her to shadow your call, just to, like, get a little bit of a deeper look under the hood.
Oh, got it, got it, got it.
Yeah, I'll see if I can invite it to the next one.
Yeah.
Diligent.
Yeah, so we're meeting them tomorrow.
Trying to think.
So I'm, like, going through their audit right now, just basically trying to get it finished before the end of the week.
I'm going to send them an email today, Andy, as soon as you send me the draft, I can package it up.
I don't know if there's anything else.
Their Looker dashboard is still pending.
I sent a linear message to Suleiman and Vivek to see what's, like, what they need.
For me, I think the content OS wasn't set up, not properly, but it just needed to be, like, reformatted.
So I think we're all good on that front, so we should be able to set it up for them.
Yeah.
Very well, because learn Thank
And, yeah, I think that's about it.
Okay.
Sounds good.
Oh, sorry.
By the way, Dave, do you have a link to your meeting with Tyler last week?
Yeah, that was a great meeting.
I have a link.
I'll send it to you now.
Okay, thank you.
Good.
Yeah, Dave, share that in the internal channel just for everybody's context.
The diligent channel.
Okay, everybody, I think we're good on, it's basically handed off.
Carrie's, like, taking it over.
George, I'm feeling pretty good about that.
Just go ahead and check there.
Yeah, no updates on mine.
I'll catch up on the internal thread from Carrie.
Yeah.
Yeah.

I mean, she's definitely really on it, and they're, like, moving forward with a clear strategy, and then Interwell, we're meeting today for some internal alignment, and then our meeting with them is tomorrow, and hopefully they have moved content, or moved, like, their internal process forward for migrating their content, because that's what blocked for us.
Nice.
And I think that's everything.
Can we cover just Surge and Ogwin Co.
to keep me on my toes?
Yeah, yeah, let's do it.
These are pretty random, so if anyone needs to drop, that's fine.
Surge, so two main things this week.
We have a branding workshop with Surge.
What Edwin, their CEO, is most concerned about and cares most about right now is the narrative that they're putting out, literally, into the world about the company.
And how it's perceived, and so right now, instead of...
Getting granular on blog edits or anything editorial, that's more what he cares about.
So this Thursday, we have a two-hour blog for a branding workshop with them to help set the entire brand strategy narrative moving forward this Wednesday.
So tomorrow, we have our weekly meeting, so we'll update them on the events we're hosting.
We've got to get moving on dinner invites for that AI dinner.
And we have to prep some thoughts for the Forbes interview and for a podcast appearance that they're having.
So there's a lot of other little things in the background, but that's Surge in a nutshell.
It's the branding workshop, and then it's nailing the meeting tomorrow.
And then augment code, there's a lot.
might skip up it.
Long story short is we increased weekly volume from 20 to 30 articles focused on what's working, which are the comparison articles and listicles.
So Marisol...
Kind of pivoted all the content she's generating to those things, plus terms that are essentially trending right now in the space, like context engineering, cloud code, et cetera.
So like focusing all our efforts there to capture as many clicks, impressions as possible.
And we're also choosing three to five of those articles to like spotlight and place bets and money behind and add dollars and in backlinks.
And so I'm giving those, getting those articles like a more expert reviews because they're more polished because we're going to be driving more traffic to them.
So it's kind of like, which three to five do we want to try to rank on page one for or number one for?
And we are putting a little more effort behind those as like another bet to show the client some more progress.
Thank you.
Awesome.
Okay.
Anybody have any, like, call-outs or need any help anywhere that we didn't cover?
Dave, while we're here, how's the, like, SEO audit, like, process going?
Yeah, so I actually have a Notion document that I put together that I can share with the group.
Its main goal is to provide, like, a checklist with tools needed, impact, and all kind of the things that are needed when we're doing an audit.
So I can post that in the channel, and if folks want to get feedback, that's fine.
Sounds good.
All right.
right.
Thanks, guys.
15 minutes.
Have a good one.
Thank you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on client project updates and discuss strategy across multiple accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New client Udemy kickoff occurred; recording and materials available for review](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [SEO audit process being standardized; Dave creating comprehensive checklist](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Multiple accounts (Ambient, Tavern, Outreach, Sentinel One) progressing with content creation and strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Okta project advancing with SDR enablement workflows and deep dives scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Topics

### Udemy Project Initiation

  - [Kickoff meeting held in-person; recorded via boardroom media recorder](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Materials sent for team review; additional info available if needed](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Weekly sync to be scheduled; artifacts to be updated and shared ahead of sync](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### Ambient Project Progress

  - [Simran working on artifacts today](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Product deep dive scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Tavern Project Status

  - [Client slow to respond; communication challenges noted](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Aida conducting initial keyword research for content OS](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Meeting scheduled for tomorrow to present strategy and initial research](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Outreach Content Creation

  - [Three blog outlines sent for client review](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Matt to generate drafts upon approval](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Vacation coverage tasks assigned to Matt, including content audit in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Sentinel One Content Strategy

  - [Sydney completing three blogs](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Meeting scheduled for tomorrow to share progress](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Pushing to switch content approver from Mahadi to Ankit (SEO lead) for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Sentinel One Technical SEO Audit

  - [Dave halfway through audit, uncovering significant issues (e.g., canonical tags to different domain)](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Audit results to be compiled in spreadsheet and shared with Aida before client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Okta Project Update

  - [Focus on SDR enablement workflows and niche artifact consolidation](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Creating automated SDR call prep and account briefs](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Two more deep dives scheduled with SDRs this week to gather specific insights](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Diligent Project Status

  - [Meeting scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Aida completing audit before week's end](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Looker dashboard pending; awaiting input from Suleiman and Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Content OS setup being finalized](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Surge Branding Initiative

  - [Two-hour branding workshop scheduled for Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Focus on company narrative and perception](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Prep needed for Forbes interview and podcast appearance](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [AI dinner event invites to be sent](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### Augment Co Content Strategy

  - [Increased weekly content volume from 20 to 30 articles](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Pivoted focus to comparison articles, listicles, and trending topics](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Selecting 3-5 articles for additional investment (ads, backlinks, expert reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

### SEO Audit Process Improvement

  - [Dave created a Notion document with comprehensive audit checklist](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Includes tools needed, impact assessment, and key audit components](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share Udemy kickoff recording and materials with team](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Update and share artifacts for Ambient before weekly sync](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Matt to complete Outreach content audit tasks](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Dave to finalize Sentinel One audit by end of day for Aida's review](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [George to invite Stevie to shadow next Okta deep dive call](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Aida to push for Ankit as new content approver for Sentinel One](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Team to prep for multiple client meetings scheduled for tomorrow (Ambient, Tavern, Sentinel One, Diligent)](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [George to prepare for Surge branding workshop and weekly meeting](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Dave to share SEO audit process checklist in team channel for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/cU3JeSoA-7oah_Eotf5CwuZ1k4sHcj3c?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

action_items.description: Complete Sentinel One audit, send to Aida EOD for Wed meeting prep
Invite Stevie to shadow next Okta deep dive call w/ SDRs
Share Tyler meeting link in Diligent internal Slack channel
Review Carrie's internal thread updates on Everybody account
Post Notion doc w/ SEO audit process checklist in team channel
